name: @radzor/stripe-checkout
description: Simplified Stripe Checkout integration. Creates checkout sessions, handles payment webhooks, and manages subscription lifecycle.

inputs.name: priceId
inputs.description: Stripe Price ID for the product or subscription.

inputs.name: quantity
inputs.description: Quantity of the item to purchase.

inputs.name: successUrl
inputs.description: URL to redirect to after successful payment.

inputs.name: cancelUrl
inputs.description: URL to redirect to if the user cancels checkout.

inputs.name: mode
inputs.description: Checkout mode: one-time payment or recurring subscription.

inputs.name: secretKey
inputs.description: Stripe secret API key (sk_live_... or sk_test_...). Server-side only.

inputs.name: webhookSecret
inputs.description: Stripe webhook signing secret (whsec_...) for verifying webhook events.

outputs.name: checkoutSession
outputs.description: The created Stripe Checkout session with URL and ID.

events.name: onPaymentSuccess
events.description: Fired when payment is successfully completed (via webhook).

events.name: onSubscriptionCreated
events.description: Fired when a new subscription is created.

events.name: onSubscriptionCanceled
events.description: Fired when a subscription is canceled.

actions.name: createCheckout

params.name: customerEmail
params.description: Customer email for the checkout session.

actions.description: Create a new Stripe Checkout session and return the session URL.

actions.name: getPaymentStatus
actions.description: Check the payment status of a checkout session.

actions.name: cancelSubscription
actions.description: Cancel an active subscription at the end of the current billing period.

actions.name: handleWebhook

params.name: payload
params.description: Raw request body from Stripe webhook.

actions.description: Verify and parse a Stripe webhook event.

llm.constraints: Requires Stripe secret key (server-side) and publishable key (client-side). Webhook endpoint must be publicly accessible. Use STRIPE_SECRET_KEY and STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET environment variables.
